district.title: Know Your District
district.subtitle: Anand District, Gujarat
district.step1Desc: Create a free account on CivicPulse
district.step2Desc: Submit your civic issue with photo & location
district.step3Desc: Monitor status and get resolution updates

faq.q1: How do I report a civic issue?
faq.a1: Register for a free account, log in, and click Report Issue. Fill in the title, description, select your ward, pin your location on the map, and upload a photo or video. Our AI will automatically detect the issue category.
faq.a2: When you upload a photo, our AI analyzes it using computer vision to identify the type of issue — pothole, garbage, broken streetlight, water leakage, and more. It then automatically routes your complaint to the correct department. You can confirm or change the AI's suggestion before submitting.
faq.q3: Can I track my complaint without logging in?
faq.a3: Yes. Visit the Track Complaint page and enter your Report ID (e.g. R00042). You can see the current status, assigned department, and resolution timeline without needing to log in.
faq.q4: How long does it take to resolve an issue?
faq.a4: Resolution time depends on the issue type and priority: Urgent issues: 24 hours SLA, High priority: 48 hours SLA, Medium priority: 72 hours SLA, Low priority: 7 days SLA. You receive email notifications at every status change.
faq.q5: What if my issue is not resolved after the deadline?
faq.a5: Issues that exceed their SLA deadline are automatically escalated to senior authorities. The Department Manager is notified at L1, and the Municipal Commissioner is notified at L2 and L3 escalations.
faq.q6: Can I report the same issue that someone else already reported?
faq.a6: Instead of creating a duplicate, you can upvote an existing issue. More upvotes increase the issue's visibility and priority. Our system checks for nearby issues automatically when you submit.
faq.q7: In which languages is the platform available?
faq.a7: The platform is available in English, Hindi (हिंदी), and Gujarati (ગુજરાતી). Use the language selector in the navbar to switch at any time.
faq.a8: Yes. Your personal details are never shown publicly. Only your report content and location are visible on the public map. All data is encrypted and stored securely. Read our Privacy Policy for full details.

disclaimer.allowedDesc: Potholes, broken streetlights, garbage overflow, water leakage, drainage blockage, park damage, and other civic infrastructure problems in Anand District.
disclaimer.confirmation: I confirm that my complaint is a genuine civic issue and does not fall in any of the excluded categories above.
